approvalNote: Peter requested a repaired River mentor guidance line on 2026-06-14. V1 repair was rejected because ElevenLabs spoke direction text; V2 sends exact spoken words only.

mentor_river_steward.role: Selected app mentor voice repair; exact spoken text only

takes.speaker: app_mentor
takes.text: Nice work. Add native pond plants, make a shallow edge, and leave some messy shelter nearby. Don't collect frogs or frogspawn from the wild. If the habitat is right, the right creatures will find it.
